title: Indexes, Query Plans, Operator Costs, and Responsible Tuning · Stakeholder Data Mission
summary: A service reliability manager. The manager needs time-aware metrics whose grain, windows, plans, and performance claims survive changed data. Planned artifact: Deliver Service-Level Analytics and Tuning Dossier with acceptance evidence, rubric defense, reflection, and a changed-constraint extension. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Build running and rolling aggregates with explicit ROWS or RANGE frames and edge-case checks.
Separate instants, local civil time, duration, calendar boundaries, and incomplete reporting windows.
Read EXPLAIN evidence while separating estimates, actual measurements, and engine-specific plan vocabulary.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.sql:
-- sql-basics cumulative relational data portfolio.
-- Each increment declares grain, predicts cardinality or changed rows, runs in fresh browser SQLite,
-- reconciles results, tests changed data, and records PostgreSQL or standard-SQL boundaries.

SELECT sqlite_version() AS browser_sqlite_version;
